messages.body_plain:
Are you insatiably curious? A lover of research, statistics, and
programming? Do you enjoy a formidable business challenge? If so, then we
share a lot in common and would love to get to know you better.

Find out more in the job description
<https://gradient-metrics.breezy.hr/p/8741b6af3185> for experienced Data
Scientist with a knowledge of R

-- 

Marcin Kosi?ski Gradient Metrics | Data Scientist 0048 503 435 652

*Subscribe* <https://www.gradientmetrics.com/subscribe> to Trendlines to
receive our proprietary research in your inbox for free. *Read our most
recent Trendlines edition online here.*
<https://www.gradientmetrics.com/latest-trendlines>

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
